top_signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
top_signals.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Trump’s 3,711 Trades Point to Multiple Stock-Market Strategies
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump’s latest financial disclosure has drawn scrutiny for its astonishing scale: 3,711 trades, almost entirely in shares of companies across America, including many whose fortunes can turn on federal policy. Bloomberg News US Equities Team Leader Elena Popina joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Binance denies new WSJ report alleging $850M in Iran-linked transactions
top_signals.summary: Binance CEO Richard Teng denied a new WSJ report alleging $850 million in Iran-linked transactions flowed through the exchange to the IRGC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
